testcase.name: test_empty_enabled_coins_returns_no_opps

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected empty opps when enabled_coins=[], got 10 (settings.enabled_coins=['BONK', 'ORCA', 'PYTH', 'JTO', 'RAY', 'WIF', 'SOL', 'JUP', 'RENDER', 'POPCAT', 'MEW', 'IO']) assert [{'id': 'IO-1...63, ...}, ...] == []
Left contains 10 more items, first extra item: {'id': 'IO-1782653622765', 'coin': 'IO', 'cex_price': 0.1717, 'dex_price': 0.17073803952540625, ...}
Full diff: - [] + [ + {...
...Full output truncated (130 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1p2_enhancements.py:157: in test_empty_enabled_coins_returns_no_opps assert opps == [], ( E AssertionError: Expected empty opps when enabled_coins=[], got 10 (settings.enabled_coins=['BONK', 'ORCA', 'PYTH', 'JTO', 'RAY', 'WIF', 'SOL', 'JUP', 'RENDER', 'POPCAT', 'MEW', 'IO']) E assert [{'id': 'IO-1...63, ...}, ...] == [] E E Left contains 10 more items, first extra item: {'id': 'IO-1782653622765', 'coin': 'IO', 'cex_price': 0.1717, 'dex_price': 0.17073803952540625, ...} E E Full diff: E - [] E + [ E + {... testcase.name: test_max_daily_trades_cap_enforced

failure.message: AssertionError: max_daily_trades cap breached: final=11 > cap=4 assert 11 <= 4

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1p2_enhancements.py:214: in test_max_daily_trades_cap_enforced assert final_dt <= cap, ( E AssertionError: max_daily_trades cap breached: final=11 > cap=4 E assert 11 <= 4
